creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
all 5 have a similar config modulo the names:
ler in ler-r610 in /zroot/vm-bhyve🔒 as 🧙
✔️0 ❯ cat talos1/talos1.conf
loader="uefi"
cpu=4
memory=32G
network0_type="virtio-net"
network0_switch="public"
disk0_type="virtio-blk"
disk0_name="disk0.img"
uuid="c5bdcff0-f597-11ec-a8eb-f04da208519c"
network0_mac="58:9c:fc:0c:c7:c9"

ler in ler-r610 in /zroot/vm-bhyve🔒 as 🧙
✔️0 ❯
